\tzpentry{ID4931}{Coupled Cymatic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4931 introduces Coupled Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H}_{\text{cymatic}} = g \sum \hat{a}^{\dagger} \hat{a} \otimes \hat{x}_{\text{mech}} \end{equation}
